title: sqlite3_update_hook gives incorrect table name with shared cache
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE orders (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount REAL NOT NULL, order_date TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
UPDATE orders SET amount = NULL WHERE id = 1;
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE amount IS NULL;
key_bug_features: sqlite3_update_hook with shared cache returns wrong table name
